rag_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE contracts
Generate guarantee statements using AGREE logical operators such as and, or, not, and implication =>
generic_rules: Assign only to existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
Ensure type consistency between assumed and actual types in AGREE expressions
Use const declarations for invariant values and eq for boolean expressions in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use => for implication in guarantee statements
Use nested if-then-else for complex conditional logic
Use pre(t) for temporal recurrence in stateful equations
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use assign for non-output features or undeclared variables
